title: Media Control Symbols: Copy & Paste ▶ ⏸ ⏹ Play, Pause, Power
meta_description: Copy and paste media control symbols — play, pause, stop, record, skip, fast-forward, eject, and power buttons. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: Play, pause, stop, skip, eject, and power buttons — the full media-transport set. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: Media control symbols are the universal buttons for playback and power. This library collects the play, pause, stop, and record glyphs, the skip, seek, fast-forward, and eject controls, and the IEC power symbols used on switches and devices — all plain Unicode characters you can copy into interfaces, docs, and posts.

sections.label: Playback
sections.intro: The core transport buttons for playing, pausing, stopping, and recording.

sections.label: Skip & Seek
sections.intro: Track navigation, fast-forward, rewind, and eject controls.

sections.label: Power
sections.intro: The IEC 60417 power, standby, and sleep symbols used on devices.

related.title: Arrow Symbols
related.desc: Directional arrows, triangles, and pointer characters to copy and paste.

related.title: Geometric Symbols
related.desc: Triangles, squares, circles, and other geometric shapes in Unicode.

related.title: Tech & Status Symbols
related.desc: Battery, signal, and device status symbols to copy and paste.
